folio.label: 98v
folio.l: Witú ful sad face , and gan the child to blisse
And lulled it , and after gan it kysse
¢ And thus she seide , in hire benygne vois
Fare wel my child , I shal the neuäe se
But sithe I haue the marked , witú the crois
Of thilke fader , I blissed mot thow be
That for vs deyed , vp on a cros of tree
Thy soule litel child , I hi~ betake
For this nygút , shalt æè dyen for my sake
¢ I trowe that to a Norice , in this caas
It had ben hard , this reuthe for to se
Wel mygút a moder thanne , han cried allas
But nathelees , so sad and stedefast was she
That she endured , al aduersitee
And to the Sergeau~t , mekely she seyde
Haue heere a geyn , ©oure litel ©ong mayde
¢ Gotú now q¶ she , and dotú my my lordes heste
But o thyng wold I preye ©ow , of ©oure grace
That but my lord , for bad ©ow at the leste
Berietú this litel body , in sum place
That beestes ne no briddes , it to race
But he no word , wolde to the purpos seye
But toke the child , and went vp on his weye
¢ This Sergeau~t cam , vn to his lord a geyn
And of Grisildis wordes , and of hire chere
He told hi~ poynt for poynt , in short and pleyn
And hi~ presentetú , witú his dougúter dere
Sumwhat this lord , hatú reuthe in his manere
But nathelees , his purpos held he stille
As lordes don , whan they wyln han here wille
¢ And bad this Sergeaunt , that he preuyly
Shulde this child ful softe , wynde and wrappe
Witú alle the circumstauncez , tenderly
And carie it in a coffre , or in a lappe
But vp on peyne , his hede of for to swappe
That noman shulde knowe , of this entent
Ne whens he cam , ne whider that he went
¢ But at Boloigne , to his Suster deere
That thilke tyme , of Pauyk was Contesse
He shuld it take , and shewe hire this matere
Bysekyngö hire , to don hire besynesse
This child to fostren , in al gentilnesse
And whos child that it was , he bad hire hyde
From euäy wygút , for ougút that may betide
¢ The Sergeau~t´ gotú , and hatú fulfilled this thyngö
But to the Markys , now retourne we
For now gotú he , ful fast ymaginyngö

note.notetxt: there is a dot on the y/ODR/
